positive: A vibrant, symmetrical geometric depiction of a cosmic forest canopy and whimsical, celestial fauna. The main subject is a cluster of stylized glowing flora and abstracted animal silhouettes (e.g., flying owls, crystalline mushrooms). Use intricate linework and clean vector art style. The composition must be perfectly centered, highly symmetrical, and optimized for a square apparel print area. Color palette: deep navy indigo, metallic gold, and electric teal, emphasizing high contrast between solid black silhouettes and vibrant backlighting. Highly detailed, abstract, graphic design, studio lighting, tattoo flash aesthetic, clean silhouette art.
negative: blurry, jpeg artifacts, low detail, messy lines, watermark, text, signature, cropped, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, cartoon, photorealistic, bokeh, graffiti, illegible
